title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at My Home Group

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at My Home Group
jsonLd.description:
My Home Group has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Gwalior office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About My Home Group:
My Home Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with My Home Group!
